overall.description: First-person exploration through a dystopian cyberpunk urban environment, transitioning from covered plazas and neon-lit corridors to open construction sites and damaged streets. The footage showcases high-quality game engine rendering with distinctive teal and orange lighting typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

turning right to follow the plaza corridor

segments.scene_description: Walking through a semi-covered urban plaza with graffiti-covered concrete floors and tropical vegetation. The camera passes by seated individuals on concrete benches and colorful wall murals while moving under large curved concrete structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor with closed shops

events.description: entering dark indoor corridor from semi-covered plaza
passing under bright teal neon signage illuminating the walls

agents.ego_description: walking through dark corridor with neon storefronts and tiled support pillars

fluorescent tube lights mounted on ceiling and walls
metal security shutter with graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Moving through a dark enclosed commercial corridor illuminated by teal neon signs including 'Snapped Synapse Roasters'. The space features tiled support pillars, closed shop fronts with metal shutters, and scattered debris on the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with ventilation fans approaching exit

events.description: approaching bright exit, natural light becoming visible at end of corridor
reaching the end of corridor with large exit opening to outside

agents.ego_description: continuing through corridor passing large industrial fans mounted on walls

notable_agents.action: person walking away from camera toward the bright exit

entered.detail: large circular metal exhaust fan with blades mounted on wall
concrete steps leading up to bright outdoor area
wall covered in yellow and white graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the corridor toward a bright exit, passing large industrial ventilation fans mounted on the walls. The lighting transitions from artificial neon to natural daylight as the camera approaches the concrete stairway leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor construction site with temporary barriers

events.description: exiting indoor corridor to outdoor construction area with overcast sky
passing large concrete barriers with EXPO graffiti painted on wall

agents.ego_description: walking through open construction site with cranes visible in background

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow jacket standing near construction materials

entered.detail: tall yellow construction crane against overcast sky
large concrete wall with EXPO painted in white letters
red and white striped concrete road blocks

segments.scene_description: Exiting into an open construction site with overcast skies, passing red and white barriers and a large wall with 'EXPO' graffiti. Construction cranes tower in the background above damaged buildings and scaffolding structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: damaged urban street with construction debris

events.description: large black truck with yellow graffiti driving past on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along wet street passing damaged buildings and construction equipment

notable_agents.action: large black truck with yellow graffiti driving past

entered.detail: multi-story building with exposed structure and broken facade
derelict truck with graffiti on side parked on street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet asphalt street lined with damaged buildings and construction debris. A large vehicle passes by on the left while the camera moves toward a geodesic dome structure visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban plaza through a neon-lit corridor and out into a sprawling, overcast construction zone. It begins by gliding across graffiti-covered concrete floors past tropical plants and seated figures under curved architectural structures. As the camera moves deeper into the city, the open plaza gives way to a dark commercial corridor defined by teal neon signs and metal shutters, passing industrial ventilation fans that lead toward a bright exit. The scene then shifts from artificial light to natural daylight as the camera ascends a stairway and emerges into an open construction site filled with red and white barriers and towering cranes. Finally, the movement continues along a wet asphalt street lined with damaged buildings and debris, passing a large vehicle while heading toward a distant geodesic dome.
